MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To Augment Expert Witness List
Off Calendar Nov-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SUZANNE STEARNS' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AUGMENT EXPERT WITNESS LIST.

No appearances. There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adotped as follows:

The Motion is granted. Plaintiff may add Dr. Summa, as a treating physician, to her expert witness list. Defendants knew, as early as September 15, 2022, that Plaintiff would be seeing a new treating physician, whose name she did not recall at the time of her deposition. Defendants have apparently deposed only one of the seven previously disclosed treating physicians. There is no prejudice to adding another name to that list so long as Defendants are given adequate time to depose Dr. Summa. Plaintiff shall immediately produce any medical records created by Dr. Summa.

Counsel for defendants are ordered to immediately remove, or replace with redacted copies, the documents in the Court's file that reveal plaintiff's SSN.

No sanctions.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to Judge Pro Tem Tom Cohen at: tom@thomascohen.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Matter not reported. (JPT/302)
